items.headline: Bayern deserve to be celebrated after Bundesliga title win
items.description: Bayern Munich successfully defended their Bundesliga crown thanks to a merciless attack and impressive solidarity.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball news: Minnesota gets some bad news
items.description: All of the important fantasy spin and actionable takeaways resulting from the latest baseball news.

items.headline: NFL fifth-year option tracker: 2023 first-round draft class
items.description: The deadline for teams to pick up the fifth-year option on rookie contracts is May 1. Which players have had their options picked up?

items.headline: Colts' Alec Pierce missing offseason workouts after ankle surgery
items.description: Colts WR Alec Pierce recently underwent surgery after playing through nagging ankle pain for much of last season and will be sidelined during offseason workouts.

items.headline: Tilak ends MI's losing streak with 45-ball century
items.description: It was the joint-quickest hundred by an MI batter, equalling Sanath Jayasuriya's effort from 2008

items.headline: Twins place Mick Abel on 15-day IL with elbow inflammation
items.description: The Twins placed right-hander Mick Abel on the 15-day IL with right elbow inflammation.

items.headline: Sabres took in special win, now turn the page
items.description: The Sabres reveled in their special playoff win, but they know it's time to turn the page to Game 2.

items.headline: MLS Power Rankings: East leaders Nashville continue to rise up
items.description: Nashville SC continue its great week as they move on up in this week's edition of ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

items.headline: Sources: Free agent QB Jimmy Garoppolo considering retirement
items.description: Free agent quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo is considering retirement, sources told NFL Network on Monday.

items.headline: Fantasy Baseball Forecaster for Week 4: April 20-26
items.description: Set your lineups for the week ahead in fantasy baseball with our preview featuring pitcher rankings, hitter ratings and schedule observations.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.

items.headline: Paraguay Superclásico suspended after fan clashes
items.description: The Paraguayan Superclásico ended in chaos and violence and was suspended after opposing fans clashed in the stands in Asunción and left supporters and policemen injured.

items.headline: Mitchell healthy for Fever's season, no regrets pushing limit in playoffs
items.description: Indiana Fever All-Star Kelsey Mitchell says she has no regrets in pushing herself to the limit before her legs gave out in last year's playoffs against Las Vegas.

items.headline: Val Ackerman, who guided Big East after team exodus, to retire
items.description: Val Ackerman is retiring this summer after leading the Big East as commissioner for 13 years, leading the conference through realignment and team exodus, as well as eight national championships during her tenure.
